institution.name: Eastern West Virginia Community and Technical College

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Eastern West Virginia Community and Technical College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.9k → $4.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eastern West Virginia Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (8.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Eastern West Virginia Community and Technical College fell 45% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.6k → $4.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Eastern West Virginia Community and Technical College fell 35% between 2017 and 2020 ($13.1k → $8.5k).
